title: Earning is allowed to be easy and endless
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for removing the income ceiling.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 34 of the MONEY program. The release names the income-ceiling belief; the allow opens room for earning that has no imposed limit.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 34 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you sense an invisible ceiling on what you believe you can earn.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 34 of the MONEY program. The income ceiling is a belief, not a fact. This statement names and releases it.
I am ready to release the belief that my income must have a ceiling. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow earning that is easy and without limit. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 34 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
